positive: A mystical forest scene embracing celestial magic. A central composition features a luminous, stylized stag silhouette with branching antlers, standing amongst deeply detailed, interwoven flora. The background depicts a swirling galaxy merging with giant bioluminescent ferns and mushrooms. Use highly contrasting deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) balanced by vibrant cosmic gold highlights and electric turquoise accents. The style should be a blend of highly intricate Art Nouveau illustration and modern psychedelic vaporwave aesthetics, emphasizing strong, bold lines, clean silhouettes, and perfect symmetry. The overall mood is ethereal, powerful, and wondrous, optimized for a repeatable print pattern on dark fabric. Centralized, detailed, vector-art quality.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, signature, watermark, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, realistic photo, messy lines
